message:
test(ftui-core): add 18 proptest invariants for geometry primitives (Rect, Size, Sides)

Property-based tests covering algebraic and structural invariants:
- Intersection commutativity, idempotency, and containment
- Union commutativity, idempotency, and containment
- Absorption law: A ∩ (A ∪ B) = A (for non-empty rects)
- Contains/intersection agreement
- Inner margin shrinks dimensions
- Right/bottom edge saturation consistency
- Size clamp_max/clamp_min monotonicity
- Area = width * height identity
- Empty rect properties
- Sides sum consistency with saturating arithmetic
- No panics on full u16 range for all operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
